title: Playing Card Models
description: Custom models for playing cards in vanilla.
body:
Are you tired of using maps or banners to create playing cards in Minecraft? Or perhaps you're hesitant to install a mod solely to use cards in-game? Introducing custom playing card models!

## Features
This resource pack adds custom model data to the paper item, using `minecraft:select` model selection.

A datapack is also available, defining a function `cards:deck` that summons a bundle with one of each card model, and crafting recipes for the bundle of cards (in various colors!).
